message:
fix(ftui-tty): borrow checker + clippy fixes + PTY cleanup tests (bd-lff4p.4.2)

- Fix borrow conflict in drain_resize_notifications by coalescing
  SIGWINCH signals before querying tty size
- Fix 3 clippy lints (collapsible_if x2, redundant_closure)
- Add RawModeGuard::enter_on() for PTY-based testing
- Add 3 PTY tests: raw mode enter/restore, panic cleanup, cleanup
  sequence verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
